message:
fix(macaroon): evaluate discharge first-party caveats during verification

verify_with_discharges checked HMAC chain integrity and binding of
discharge macaroons but never evaluated the discharge's own first-party
caveats (TimeBefore, MaxUses, etc.) against the VerificationContext.
Per Birgisson et al. 2014, all caveats from both authorizing and
discharge macaroons must be satisfied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
